zh.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger於1618年2月1日出生在瑞士波藍根塔爾。她於1636年5月9日與Jacob Müller在瑞士波藍根塔爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger于1618年2月1日出生在瑞士波藍根塔爾。她于1636年5月9日与Jacob Müller在瑞士波藍根塔爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Boesinger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Biesingen, Bisingen, or Bissingen, all in southern Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Verena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Characteristically Swiss name, first borne by a 3rd-century saint who lived as a hermit near Zurich. She is said to have come originally from Thebes in Egypt, and the origin of her name is obscure. This name is now occasionally used in the English-speaking world, where it is taken as an elaboration of   Vera .

historicEvents.description: All European peace treaty formally accepts Switzerland as an independent nation.

en.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger was born on 1 February 1618, in Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland. She married Jacob Müller on 9 May 1636, in Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger est née le 1 février 1618, à Langenthal, Berne, Suisse. Elle a épousé Jacob Müller le 9 mai 1636, à Langenthal, Berne, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger wurde am 1. Februar 1618 in Langenthal, Bern, Schweiz geboren. Sie hat am 9. Mai 1636 in Langenthal, Bern, Schweiz Jacob Müller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger è nata il il 1 febbraio 1618 nel Langenthal, Berna, Svizzera. Lei sposato Jacob Müller il 9 maggio 1636, nel Langenthal, Berna, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Verena Boesingerは1618年2月1日にスイスバーンランジェンサルで生まれた。1636年5月9日にスイスバーンランジェンサルでJacob Müllerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger(은)는 1618년 2월 1일 스위스 버 랭솔에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1636년 5월 9일 스위스 버 랭솔에서 Jacob Müller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1618, em Langenthal, Bern, Suiça. Ela casou-se com Jacob Müller em 9 de maio de 1636, em Langenthal, Bern, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger родилась 1 февраля 1618 г. в местности лангентэл, бирн, Швейцария. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacob Müller 9 мая 1636 г. в местности лангентэл, бирн, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Verena Boesinger nació el 1 de febrero de 1618, en Langenthal, Bern, Suiza. Se casó con Jacob Müller el 9 de mayo de 1636, en Langenthal, Bern, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas.
